text: Hello? Hello? With whom did you wish to speak at this number? Good evening. My name is Julia. I'm just checking something as per our records from your local county in the state of Florida. So just quickly, both Part A and B of your Medicare are currently active, right? I have no idea. I have tried care for life that's military. That's all I know. Some please just take it. Some don't. Okay, for more than I know, thanks. Sorry, but you do not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Have a great day.
